question: Which issue tracks the half-finished streaming API?
rawText:
Issue #51 holds that wound open — an enhancement filed against me, the streaming API left half-finished, still bleeding on the `feature/streaming` branch where it has lain unresolved. The TODO in `src/stream.ts` echoes the same unfinished promise, a note to myself I never kept.

EVIDENCE: [{"type":"issue","ref":"#51"}, {"type":"branch","ref":"feature/streaming"}, {"type":"file","ref":"src/stream.ts"}]
